utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey ! I am in , they are gonna let me audition !

emotion_cause.span: 1_I am in , they are gonna let me audition !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I know ! I know ! It turns out that one of the casting ladies has actually seen me in a play , so I steered clear of her .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I am in , they are gonna let me audition !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh yeah , yeah ! He is done tons of commercials . I have seen him in like Sugar Smacks , Playstation , and that one for the phone company . In fact he was so good in that one , he actually convinced me to switch phone companies .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah well , he is not gonna get this one . Ben is way cuter than that kid .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean look at him , look at you ...

emotion_cause.span: 7_Ben is way cuter than that kid .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: That is great . Listen , would not it be great though if I got to play Ben dad ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_would not it be great though if I got to play Ben dad ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Joey , you look nothing like Ben .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I look more like him than you do !

utterances.speaker: Carol
utterances.text: You know , I really do not know you well enough for you to do that .
